summary: Restored BettyBoard soundboard captures a scorching Around & Around and a killer Casey Jones, despite a wobble on Stella Blue.
review: The recording is a lovingly‑restored BettyBoard tape that sounds crisp and balanced, with the usual high‑quality mix from C. Miller. Musically the show shines – Around & Around is called “one of the hottest ever,” and Bob’s work on Casey Jones is highlighted, while Jerry’s solo receives special praise; the only dip noted is a phrasing stumble on Stella Blue (and a less‑enthusiastic Sunrise).

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers are highly positive (5 and 4 stars); the show is praised with only minor performance quirks, and the restored soundboard recording is described as excellent.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Restored BettyBoard tape with crisp mix; a few rough patches but overall clear, balanced, and well‑preserved.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows strong overall, highlighted by a fiery second‑half sequence; only minor hiccups on Stella Blue and an underwhelming Sunrise break the momentum.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Struggles with phrasing on Stella Blue but delivers a brilliant first solo with notable feedback/sustain.
band_member_comments.Bob: Makes Casey Jones shine; praised as “Bobby makes the song.”
